GameKey.description: A 9 digit unique code identifying the game that this record corresponds to. The GameID is composed of Season; SeasonType; Week and HomeTeam. Note: This value will be NULL for bye weeks

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this game corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The NFL season of the game

Week.description: The NFL week of the game (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to 4). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Date.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the home team

Channel.description: The television station broadcasting the game

PointSpread.description: The oddsmaker point spread at game start from the perspective of the team (negative numbers indicate the HomeTeam is favored; positive numbers indicate the AwayTeam is favored)

OverUnder.description: The total points line (over/under) at game start

StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the team's current home stadium

Canceled.description: Indicates whether the game was canceled

GeoLat.description: The geographic latitude coordinate of the venue where the game is taking place

GeoLong.description: The geographic longitude coordinate of the venue where the game is taking place

ForecastTempLow.description: The forecasted low temperature on game day at this venue (Fahrenheit).

ForecastTempHigh.description: The forecasted high temperature on game day at this venue (Fahrenheit).

ForecastDescription.description: The forecast description on game day at this venue.

ForecastWindChill.description: The forecasted wind chill on game day at this venue.

ForecastWindSpeed.description: The forecasted wind speed on game day at this venue.

AwayTeamMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the away team

HomeTeamMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the home team

Day.description: The date of the game (in US Eastern Time)

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalAwayTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the away team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalHomeTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the home team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

StadiumDetails.description: The details of the stadium where this game is played

Status.description: The status of the game. For a description of possible values, see here. For how suspended and postponed games are handled specifically, see here.

IsClosed.description: Indicates whether the game is over and the final score has been verified and closed out.

DateTimeUTC.description: The date and time of the game (in UTC)
